meta.title: Olive Oil Tasting in Calgary | Mixler
meta.description: Discover the world of extra virgin olive oil at a tasting event in Calgary. Learn to taste, evaluate, and choose great olive oil. No experience needed.

content.subtitle: Taste the difference between great olive oil and everything else.
content.intro: Olive oil tasting events in Calgary are a genuinely eye-opening experience for anyone who cooks. Most people have never tasted truly fresh, high-quality extra virgin olive oil, and the difference from what you buy at a grocery store is remarkable. A guide walks you through the tasting method, helps you identify flavour profiles, and explains what to look for when buying.

what_to_expect.heading: A curated selection of oils
what_to_expect.body: You'll taste 4 to 6 extra virgin olive oils from different regions and harvest times. The range in flavour is genuinely surprising.

what_to_expect.heading: Proper tasting technique
what_to_expect.body: The guide teaches you how to warm the oil in your hands, nose it, and taste it correctly to assess quality.

what_to_expect.heading: Understanding quality markers
what_to_expect.body: You'll learn what pungency, bitterness, and fruitiness mean in the context of olive oil and why they signal freshness.

what_to_expect.heading: Bread and palate cleansers
what_to_expect.body: Neutral bread and water keep your palate fresh between tastings so each oil gets a fair assessment.

tips: Good olive oil should have a peppery finish in the throat. That sensation means the polyphenols are still active.
Check the harvest date, not just the best-before date. Fresher oil has more flavour and health benefits.
Calgary's specialty food shops increasingly stock high-quality imported olive oils. Knowing what you're tasting helps you choose better.
Olive oil tasting pairs beautifully with a cheese board session. The two experiences complement each other well.
Mixler lists olive oil tasting events in Calgary when they come up. Join the waitlist and we'll email you when one is added.
content.waitlist_heading: Want to know when we run olive oil tasting events?
content.waitlist_body: Join the waitlist and we'll email you when we add one. We use this to plan what to run next.

faq.q: Do I need food knowledge to enjoy this?
faq.a: Not at all. The guide explains everything as you go. You just need to be curious and willing to taste.

faq.q: How is olive oil tasting different from wine tasting?
faq.a: The evaluation process is similar but olive oil is assessed for fruitiness, bitterness, and pungency. You drink from small cups, not glasses.

faq.q: How many oils will I taste?
faq.a: Most events feature 4 to 6 oils, enough to show meaningful differences without overwhelming your palate.

faq.q: Can I buy the oils after the tasting?
faq.a: Many events offer the featured oils for purchase. Check with the organizer for specifics.
